text:
Alois Tybur is the son of Willy Tybur.

Appearance

Like his brothers, Alois is seen wearing dress clothes.

Story

Marley arc

When the Tybur family arrives in Liberio following the Marley Mid-East War, Rico joins his family to take up residence within the headquarters.

Later, he and his siblings beg their father to take them to the festival. Fine is entrusted to watch over them.
